---
title: "Yi-Hsin Sam Lu"
---

Research Assistant at Tzu Chi Hospital, specializing in survival analysis, statistical modeling for medical data, and bioinformatics. Master's graduate in Applied Mathematics, currently researching improvements to survival models like Cox regression for medical data while deepening expertise in VCF file processing and variant annotation workflows.

```{r load_packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(fontawesome)
```

##  `r fa("hammer")` SKILLS

### [`r fa("r-project")` R](https://www.r-project.org/) `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "solid")` `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "solid")` `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "solid")` `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "solid")` `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "solid")`
### [`r fa("shield")` Bash](https://www.gnu.org/software/bash/manual/bash.html) `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "solid")` `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "solid")` `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "solid")` `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "solid")` `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "regular")`
### [`r fa("python")` Python](https://www.python.org/) `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "solid")` `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "solid")` `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "solid")` `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "regular")` `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "regular")`
### [`r fa("database")` PostgreSQL](https://www.postgresql.org/) `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "solid")` `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "solid")` `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "solid")` `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "regular")` `r fa("circle", prefer_type = "regular")`

<br>

Data cleaning (dplyr), organization, visualization (ggplot2 and plotly), and analysis—with over eight years of R coding experience applied to survival analysis (survival and survminer) plus genomic data visualization. Annotating VCF files using ANNOVAR with ClinVar to support variant interpretation and genomic analysis.


##  `r fa("briefcase")` WORK HISTORY 

### **Researcher**

`r fa("calendar")` 10/2024 - Present \
`r fa("location-dot")` University of Alabama at Birmingham / Case Western Reserve University \
`r fa("user-graduate")` Adviser: Dr. Chen-Han Wilfred Wu

Bioinformatics, Statistical analysis in UK Biobank, Whole genomic sequencing annotation (ANNOVAR and ClinVar).

### **Research Assistant**

Division of Urology

`r fa("calendar")` 06/2024 - Present \
`r fa("location-dot")` Taipei Tzu-Chi Hospital \
`r fa("user-graduate")` Adviser: Dr. Yao-Chou Tsai

Statistical analysis, Survival analysis, Taiwanese UTUC database. 

### **Research Assistant**

Institute of Information Science

`r fa("calendar")` 09/2019 - 01/2020 \
`r fa("location-dot")` Academia Sinica \
`r fa("user-graduate")` Adviser: Prof. Jan-Ming Ho

Data analysis, Database for macroeconomics
variables

Statistical analysis, Survival analysis in UTUC database. 


## `r fa("graduation-cap")` EDUCATION (2)

### ![](images/NDHU_logo.png){width="36px"} Master, Applied Mathethatics, National Dong Hwa University.

-   Thesis Title: Visualization for Jazz Musicians
-   Adviser: Prof. Chen-Hai Andy Tsao
-   Date: 02/2021 - 06/2023

### ![](images/NDHU_logo.png){width="36px"} Bachelor, Statistcal Science, National Dong Hwa University.

-   Date: 09/2014 - 09/2019


## `r fa("diagram-project")` TECH EXPERIENCES (5)

### `r fa("briefcase-medical")` Impact of Kidney Stone History on Survival Outcomes in Upper Tract Urothelial Carcinoma: A Multi-Institutional Propensity Score Weighted Analysis

Bor-En Jong, MD; Hsi-Chin Wu, MD, MS; Wen-Chi Chen, MD, PhD; Wen-Jeng Wu, MD, PhD; Ching-Chia Li, MD, PhD; Yi-Hsin Lu, MS; Chen-Han Wilfred Wu, MD, PhD; Yao-Chou Tsai, MD, PhD.

- Published: [JAMA Open](https://jamanetwork.com/journals/jamanetworkopen/fullarticle/2840813)
- Source Code: [stone_w.UTUC](https://github.com/YHSamLu/stone_w.UTUC)

### `r fa("guitar")` Data Visualization for Jazz Musicians (Thesis)

-   Adviser: Prof. Chen-Hai Andy Tsao
-   Date: 06/2021 - 06/2023
-   Location: National Dong-Hwa University
-   Links: [PDF](https://yihsinlu.github.io/yhlu.io/PDF/Visualization4JazzMusicians.pdf), [Maps for Jazz Musicians](https://yihsinlu.github.io/Jazz.io/JazzMusicianMaps/JazzMusicianMaps.html)

### `r fa("volleyball")` Volleyball Matches/Players Visualization (Interest-Driven Project)

-   Date: 10/2023 - Present
-   Links: [Maps Webpage](https://yihsinlu.github.io/yhlu.io/TVL/matches_options.html

### `r fa("file-audio")` Music Feature (Statistical Machine Learning)

-   Adviser: Prof. Chen-Hai Andy Tsao
-   Date: 09/2022 - 01/2023
-   Location: National Dong-Hwa University
-   Links: [PDF](https://yihsinlu.github.io/yhlu.io/PDF/StatisticalMachineLearningClassProject_FinalReport.pdf)


### `r fa("database")` S&P Global Rating Xpress Dataset (Dataset Management)

-   PI: Prof. Chih-Kang Chu
-   Date: 08/2022 - 01/2023
-   Location: National Dong-Hwa University
